commits.message: feat(BT402): 資料格式新增「帳務備註」欄位
commits.body: 從 DEBTOR_DETAIL.BILLREMARKS 撈取帳務備註，

commits.message: style(BT403/BT410): 調整收據列印兩份裁切線置中位置
commits.body: 收據列印兩份的 print-page height 從 42vh 調整為 45.2vh，

commits.message: fix(BT403): 未勾選收據列印兩份時不插入雙面列印空白頁
commits.body: 雙面列印空白頁邏輯原本無條件執行，導致單面列印時明細和收據之間

commits.message: Add deployment notes: SqlClient DLL override for RID publish
Add QunYi adapter (inherits LingYi) for clinic 2680 惠民
commits.body: 群益 HIS API format is identical to 凌醫, reuse LingYiAdapter

commits.message: Apply TI_OUTPUT_MASK decimal formatting to numeric results
commits.body: Read TEST_ITEM.TI_OUTPUT_MASK from Oracle and format numeric result
